headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Bank Of America (BAC) After Its Strong 1 Year Run?
summary: Wondering if Bank of America at around US$52.75 is still offering value or if most of the opportunity has already played out? This article focuses squarely on what the current price might mean for you. The stock is currently priced at US$52.75, with returns of 4.9% over the last 30 days, a 1.3% decline over the last 7 days, and 29.7% over the past year. The year to date return sits at a 5.7% decline, and the 3 year and 5 year returns are 108.2% and 42.4% respectively. Recent headlines around...
